$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete. Runtime behavior is driven by configVersion, not this URL.

configVersion.description: md-utils config schema version. This is independent from the md-utils CLI version.

schemaDirectory.description: Directory where JSON Schema files are stored. Relative paths are resolved from the project root.

rules.description: Rules that decide which checks apply to which Markdown files.

name.description: Unique rule name used by md-utils rules validate <rule-name>.

ruleMatch.description: A file matches this rule only when all configured match groups pass: path includes, path excludes, and frontmatter predicates. The paths array is any-of; excludePaths is none-of; frontmatter predicates are all-of. The anyOf below is JSON Schema validation for requiring paths or frontmatter, not runtime OR matching.

paths.description: Any-of glob patterns matched against project-relative Markdown file paths. If present, a file path must match at least one pattern.

excludePaths.description: None-of glob patterns checked after paths match. If a file path matches any exclude pattern, the rule is skipped.

frontmatter.description: All-of frontmatter field matchers. Each key is a frontmatter key, and every configured key matcher must pass.

frontmatterMatcher.description: Predicates for one frontmatter key. If multiple operators are specified, all operators must pass.

includes.description: Matches when the frontmatter value is an array containing this JSON value.

notIncludes.description: Matches when the frontmatter value is an array that does not contain this JSON value.

equals.description: Matches when the frontmatter value equals this JSON value.

after.description: Matches date-like strings after this YYYY-MM-DD date.

between.description: Matches date-like strings inclusively between from and to.
